nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cisticola
nodes.summary: Cisticola（Cisticola）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联53种鸟类，如Whistling cisticola、Chattering cisticola、Trilling cisticola等53种鸟类。

nodes.name: Wing-snapping cisticola
nodes.summary: Wing-snapping cisticola（Cisticola ayresii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Wing-snapping cisticola。

nodes.name: Wing-snapping cisticola
nodes.summary: The wing-snapping cisticola (Cisticola ayresii), also known as Ayres' cisticola, is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. Its scientific name honours South African ornithologist Thomas Ayres. Distribution and habitat It is found throughout central and southern Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland. References External links Wing-snapping cisticola - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
